name: structure
description: Structural-element plot items. Each element type has its own 'plot item create <type>' command. Type names and keywords are binary-validated against FLAC2D 9.0.

available_types.description: Vector field at structural-element nodes (displacement, velocity, force-applied, reaction, etc.).

sub_items.name: contour
sub_items.description: Continuous coloring of beam-family structural elements by force / moment / displacement / velocity / link-* attributes.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create structure-beam contour moment legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Continuous moment color map along beams.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create structure-cable contour force-axial legend active on
plot item create structure-vector value displacement
plot item create structure-liner label group legend active on

notes: Element type names REQUIRE the 'structure-' prefix in FLAC2D 9.0. Bare names like 'beam', 'cable', 'liner', 'pile', 'shell', 'geogrid', 'structure-node' are NOT accepted.
'shell' and 'geogrid' have no dedicated plot item type in FLAC2D 9.0; use 'structure-liner' or check the FLAC3D vocabulary.
For node-level fix markers, use 'plot item create struct-node-fix'.
Beam-family element types (beam, cable, liner, pile) share the same top-level keyword set, but their 'contour' attribute lists differ — probe 'plot item create structure-<type> contour ?' for each.
